description: Selected as VICEROY Scholar through the MAVEN program to conduct cyber-spectrum operations in a national security environment, producing technical assessments for operational leadership.
Authoring IEEE-style research reports on cyber-spectrum topics to inform future Air Force Research Laboratory operations.
Selected for a competitive 20-week AI accelerator, building an ML portfolio project under mentorship from engineers at OpenAI, Google, and Capital One.
Applying machine learning techniques and AI-assisted development tools alongside a national undergraduate cohort.
Evaluated 100+ student submissions and conducted 1-on-1 tutoring sessions for ENGR 102 (Intro to Python).
Provided targeted feedback on code quality, style, and problem-solving approach to improve student performance.
Helped build and maintain a full-stack TypeScript, Next.js, and PostgreSQL application used by 300+ participants across each hackathon hosted.
Resolved 10+ live support tickets on data science challenges covering machine learning, web scraping, prompt engineering, and Python.
Provided Tier 1 and Tier 2 technical support to 50+ faculty and students, resolving hardware/software issues, network troubleshooting, and system configuration across Windows and macOS environments.
Managed and triaged 100+ support tickets in TeamDynamix, prioritizing requests to maintain SLA compliance and reduce resolution backlog.
Reimaged and deployed 20+ systems with standardized software configurations, cutting recurring downtime incidents and ensuring environment consistency across labs.
Upgraded storage hardware and configured multi-monitor docking station setups for faculty workstations, directly improving daily productivity for end users.
Provided excellent service to around 100 individuals by maintaining knowledge about attraction locations, asking questions and keeping casual conversations to help them feel welcomed and engaged

projects.description: A full-stack cookie ordering app for a family member's home bakery handling product catalog, cart state, live payment processing, and order storage with an admin dashboard. Built with Next.js App Router, Server Components, Supabase, Drizzle ORM, and Stripe.

A Python automation script that polls REST APIs to detect new job postings and automatically updates a tracking spreadsheet, reducing manual overhead. Handles REST API request parsing, version checking, and data diffing for seamless job application management.

A football scoreboard application built in Java using MVC architecture for CSCE314 final project, featuring a countdown timer, action history stack, and multi-package compilation. Includes model unit tests verifying score tracking, timer behavior, and state transitions.

An education website for students to learn STEM topics. Led the Blog team to ship a Blog feature to increase user engagement using Railway, and built REST API-backed backend architecture using Prisma to connect PostgreSQL databases to Vercel.
A website that shows off my experiences!
